container.title: Part C. Elective studies
container.description:
You must complete 48 credit points of elective units.

Electives can be chosen from across the Monash Indonesia campus, as long as you have met the prerequisites and there are no restrictions on enrolment in the units. Please note that completion of the following Innovation and Leadership units will allow you to complete a second major.

If you are in a double degree course you don't complete Part C. Some units required for the other degree will be credited as electives towards this degree.

container.title: Part D. Indonesian studies
container.description:
You must complete the following unit.

Note: the workload requirements (including contact hours) for each of these subjects is 2 hours per week. These units must be undertaking in parallel with your other units and cannot be completed outside Indonesia.

container.title: Part B. Major studies
container.description:
You must complete the software development major.

A major requires eight units with no more than two units at level one (12 credit points) and at least three units (18 credit points) at level three.
